description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a classic upright design with a prominent display screen and a vibrant marquee at the top, showcasing the 'Street Fighter II' logo in bold red and yellow letters. The front panel includes a coin slot and a control panel equipped with a joystick and multiple buttons, designed for interactive gameplay. The side panels are adorned with colorful graphics of Street Fighter characters in dynamic poses, set against a radiant yellow burst background. The cabinet's structure is primarily composed of wood or MDF, with a glossy laminate finish and printed decals for visual appeal. The back panel appears to have a textured or patterned graphic, adding to the overall aesthetic. The cabinet stands at a height suitable for standing play and is robust enough to support the weight of users interacting with the controls.
description: A classic upright Street Fighter II arcade game cabinet with vibrant character artwork, a bold marquee, and a joystick/button control panel. The cabinet features colorful side graphics and a coin slot on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Street Fighter II marquee, display screen, control panel with joystick and buttons, and the coin slot.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the yellow burst background and Street Fighter character graphics on the side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a patterned or textured graphic, with no visible controls or artwork.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, featuring the same yellow burst and character graphics.
attribute_screen_type: CRT display, curved, medium size with a visible bezel typical of classic arcade cabinets.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and six buttons, arranged in two rows, with a red joystick and colored buttons.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the 'Street Fighter II' logo in bold red and yellow with dynamic character artwork and a vibrant, action-themed background.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels display colorful Street Fighter character artwork on a yellow burst background, with the game's logo and dynamic action poses.
